title: Ability to change the line color on updates if on dark mode
excerpt: If I’m on dark mode, the “line” on the updates textbox shows a dark color and there is no option to change the color to a lighter one, so therefore, the line is hard to be seen.

posts.author: adrian.prudente (Adrian Prudente)
posts.cookedHtml: If I’m on dark mode, the “line” on the updates textbox shows a dark color and there is no option to change the color to a lighter one, so therefore, the line is hard to be seen.
